_warning: HAND-AUTHORED. A sync script that overwrites this file is a bug. verified:false means Shawn has not confirmed the chapter stamps against the manga yet.
_why_this_file_exists: No upstream source has the Straw Hats' route as an ordered, chapter-stamped path. The island coordinates in islands.coords.json are machine-DERIVED (a golden-angle spiral seed), so they are scattered, not in voyage order. Drawing a line straight through them in story order would zigzag through open water. This file is the authored voyage: an ordered list of waypoints, each anchored to an island slug so the drawn line connects the REAL pins the reader sees, in the order the story visits them. When island coordinates are later hand-placed (upgraded from 'derived' to 'canon'), the line improves automatically — it references the pins, it does not duplicate them.
_before_any_content_ships: Shawn must confirm every waypoint chapter below against the manga and flip verified to true. Until then the UI renders the route as unverified.
_coord_resolution: Each waypoint resolves its position from canon/islands.coords.json by `slug`. A waypoint MAY instead carry explicit lng/lat (used for Baratie, which is a sea restaurant with no island row). scripts/normalize.py FAILS LOUD on a slug that resolves to no coordinate.

waypoints.label: Set sail — Foosha Village
waypoints.source_ref: Hand-authored. Luffy leaves Foosha Village, East Blue, Chapter 1 (Romance Dawn). NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.

waypoints.label: Shells Town — Zoro

waypoints.label: Baratie — Sanji
waypoints.source_ref: Hand-authored. The sea restaurant Baratie, where Sanji is met, ~Chapter 43 (Baratie arc). Explicit lng/lat: Baratie is a floating restaurant with no island row; position is interpolated between Syrup Village and the Conomi Islands. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.
